title: National Capital Region Planning Board Rules, 1985
description: National Capital Region Planning Board Rules, 1985
text: .... .., [Published in the Gazette of India, PART III-SEC. 4 on May 24, 19!!6} NCR PL.ANNING BOARD New Del!l.i, the 3rd March 1986 No. C.11031/1/86-NCRPB.-In excrdse of tïŋ―e powers confetred by ::,..;cïŋ―1on 37 of the National Capita,1 Region Plann ing Boa.-d AcâĒ, 1>!S5 the Board hereby makes, wlth tïŋ―e pre vious approval of the Central Government, the followmg re gulations : .:_ 1. Salaries & allowances of officers and emloyees s The pay and all other allowances except House Rent Al lowance of officers and employees of the Board shaH 'oe the same as those prescribed by t,!ie Central Government for its ployees of similar status. 4. House Re11t Allowance : The officers and employees uf the Board at DelhiÂ· shall lie entitled to twenty per cent (20%) of their pay as House Rent Allowance. Other conditions for the House Rent Al lowance shall be the same 0 116 are applicable to the Central Government servants. 6. Pension, gratuity, retiremo!nt benefits and general pro vident fund.: The officers and employees of the Board shallÂ· be entitled to pension, giâĒatuity, other rdrrement benefits and_ general provident fund, at such rates and unuer such cond1uons a6 are applicable to officers and employees o( the Central Government in t!l.e co.rresponuing grades. 7. Powers under these rules vested in th.. Presid,mt shall be exercised by the Chairman and tho e of Head of Department by the Member Sec1retary, 10.
